title: Which Tasks Should You Delegate to an AI Agent?
titleCandidates: Which Tasks Should You Delegate to an AI Agent?
Turn AI Chats Into Work: A Practical Delegation Scorecard
AI Agent Task Delegation: What to Automate and What to Review
description:
A longer prompt is not automatically an agent-ready task. This video gives you a practical Task Upgrade Scorecard for deciding when AI should answer, assist, work under supervision, or run a reusable delegated workflow.

What you'll learn:
- How to test a task for concrete output, accessible context, observable feedback, and bounded risk
- How to package context, permissions, acceptance evidence, and stopping conditions around delegated work
- How to turn repeated successful tasks into reusable workflows without losing human control

Chapters:
00:00 Preface
00:55 The Work Shift
02:55 Task Fit
04:50 Upgrade Scorecard
07:26 Context and Feedback
09:21 Risk and Review
11:04 Reusable Workflows
12:37 Summary
